preamble: The aspirated retroflex affricate [ʈʂʰ] merges with the aspirated alveolar affricate [tsʰ] in several Southern Mandarin variants and Taiwanese Mandarin.

examples.note: Characteristic de-retroflexion in the aspirated series.

sources: Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
